name: volcengine-skills
description: Skills for Volcengine (火山引擎) scenarios: cloud resource operations (ECS/VPC/VKE/CLB/RDS/Redis/TOS), deployment, IaC, and SDK code generation.

interface.shortDescription: Cloud operations, deployment, IaC, and SDK code generation for Volcengine
interface.longDescription: Use Volcengine Skills to operate Volcengine (火山引擎) cloud resources (ECS/VPC/VKE/CLB/RDS/Redis/TOS) via the ve CLI, deploy apps, manage infrastructure as code, and generate runnable SDK examples.
defaultPrompt: Create an ECS instance on Volcengine.
